channel.title: Journal of Literary Theory
channel.description: A RSS feed containing the latest articles published in Journal of Literary Theory

item.title: Writing the Social. Editorial
item.description: Article by Anna Muenchrath DOI: https://doi.org/10.1515/jlt-2025-2001

item.title: Schreibweisen des Sozialen. Editorial
item.description: Article by Anna Muenchrath DOI: https://doi.org/10.1515/jlt-2025-2008

item.title: Sally Rooney and Cultural Sociology of Literature: Towards Epistemological Symmetry within Literature-and-Society Research
item.description: Article by Anna Muenchrath DOI: https://doi.org/10.1515/jlt-2025-2002

item.title: Liminale Texte. Insights from the Edge
item.description: Article by Anna Muenchrath DOI: https://doi.org/10.1515/jlt-2025-2003

item.title: Zwischen Life Writing und Kulturtheorie. Literatursoziologische Erkundung der Autoethnographie
item.description: Article by Anna Muenchrath DOI: https://doi.org/10.1515/jlt-2025-2004

item.title: En Vogue? Schreibweisen des Sozialen und ihre Verlagsgeschichten
item.description: Article by Anna Muenchrath DOI: https://doi.org/10.1515/jlt-2025-2005

item.title: Sozialfiguren in literarischen und soziographischen Gesellschaftsdarstellungen
item.description: Article by Anna Muenchrath DOI: https://doi.org/10.1515/jlt-2025-2006

item.title: The Signal in the Noise: Hermeneutics and/of Computational Literary Sociology
item.description: Article by Anna Muenchrath DOI: https://doi.org/10.1515/jlt-2025-2007
